title: Immersive Nation: UNDEAD
description: A hardcore zombie apocalypse overhaul inspired by The Walking Dead. Operation Cobalt failed. Survive the aftermath.
body:
☣️ IMMERSIVE NATION: UNDEAD (v2.0.0)
"The Medical & Combat Overhaul"
The World Ended. Now, Survival Begins.
Immersive Nation: UNDEAD is a hardcore survival overhaul for Minecraft 1.20.1 inspired by the gritty atmosphere of The Walking Dead. This 2.0.0 Mega Update marks the transition from a simple zombie mod to a deep, tactical survival experience.

💉 THE MEDICAL SYSTEM (NEW)
Survival is no longer a given. Every bite matters. Version 2.0.0 introduces the Medical DLC expansion, giving you the tools to fight back against the infection in real-time.

Standard Syringe: Stabilizes the virus. Resets the infection timer to one full day, buying you precious time.

Advanced Syringe: Purges the infection. Completely removes the virus from your system immediately.

Experimental Syringe: The ultimate cure. Purges the infection and grants Regeneration II and Resistance II buffs to help you escape the horde.

⚾ THE ICONIC HARDWARE: LUCILLE
When the medicine runs out, the hardware comes out. 2.0.0 introduces Lucille, the legendary barbed-wire wrapped baseball bat.

Combat Tier: Netherite-Equivalent.

Rarity: Epic (Purple Name).

Specialty: Massive knockback and high sweep damage, designed for crowd control against relentless hordes.

🛠️ CHANGELOG (v2.0.0)
ADDED: Full Medical System (3 Syringe Tiers).

ADDED: Custom "Immediate Cure" logic for infection handling.

ADDED: Lucille Melee Weapon with custom 16x16 pixel art.

ADDED: Survival Crafting Recipes for all new items.

IMPROVED: Creative Menu integration (Combat Tab).

IMPROVED: Full English (en_us) localization support.

📦 TECHNICAL SPECS
Version: 2.0.0

MC Version: 1.20.1

Mod Loader: Forge

Dependencies: Standalone (No extra mods required).


Commands-----

/summon immersivenationzombie:zombie ~ ~ ~ {ForgeData:{is_negan:1b},Silent:1b,CustomName:'{"text":"Negan"}',HandItems:[{id:"immersivenationzombie:lucille",Count:1b},{}]}


/summon immersivenationzombie:zombie ~ ~ ~ {ForgeData:{is_savior:1b},Silent:1b,CustomName:'{"text":"Savior"}'}
